About.metaTitle: About Albident — dental clinic in Şişli, Istanbul
About.metaDescription: Albident dental clinic in Şişli (Istanbul): doctors with international qualifications, warranties, patient reviews.

hero.heading: About Albident
hero.intro: A mid-range general dental clinic in Şişli, Istanbul. We see adult patients in three languages — Turkish, Russian, and English.

diagnostics.title: Diagnosis first
diagnostics.body: Before complex treatment we take a 3D scan and agree on the plan and price upfront. No surprises at the end.

equipment.title: Modern equipment
equipment.body: Endodontic microscope, digital implant planning, and materials by Straumann, Nobel Biocare, E.max, Invisalign.

team.title: Team & dental tourism
team.body: Doctors trained in Turkey, Switzerland, and Russia. For travelers we plan the schedule around the trip and stay in touch on WhatsApp.

warranties.heading: Warranties
warranties.intro: We give written warranties on major work — the same terms for local patients and dental tourists in any country. If something goes wrong after you return home, write to us on WhatsApp or by email with photos and X-rays, and the doctor will assess the case remotely. Hands-on warranty work requires a trip to Istanbul: the work itself is done at no extra charge, while travel and accommodation aren't covered.
exclusions: Not following the doctor's recommendations and hygiene
Third-party dentists working on the completed treatment
warranties.footnote: The warranty holds with check-ups every six months and basic oral hygiene.

Chat.title: Clinic assistant
Chat.greeting: Hello! I'm the Albident clinic assistant. Ask about services, prices, or our doctors — I'll do my best to help.
Chat.disclaimer: This is an AI assistant. It answers questions about the clinic, but does not replace a doctor's consultation.
Chat.limitMessage: Looks like you have a lot of questions — that's great! To continue, please book an appointment through the form.
Chat.errorMessage: Couldn't get a response. Please try again.
